title: crepidiastrum surugense
intro: Crepidiastrum surugense is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers are used in traditional medicine, particularly in East Asia, to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Crepidiastrum surugense has been traditionally used to enhance immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, among other health benefits. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
